feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Need Odata API to convert Purchase Req to PO
entry.content:
Currently, we are using MD04 to convert Purchase requisition into Purchase order as in screenshot below.

 

 

 

Steps to create PO from MD04 :

1. Open MD04

  • Transaction: MD04
  • Enter:
    • Material
    • Plant
  • Click Enter

2. Select PR line in MD04

 

  •   System navigates dynamically to ME21N
  •   Complete PO details
  •   Save

 

We need :

  1. Odata API to convert Purchase Req to PO
  2. We checked using API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV by giving reference of Purchase Req and Item but it did not work.
  3. If we don't have API , is there any other way to convert Purchase requisition into Purchase order

entry.title: Condition type ZINS in PO 4500021298 give negative values
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are passing ZINS condition type in header with 0.048% but PO line item showing negative values error. Please check attached screenshot.

entry.title: FIORI for DP90 (contract billing) in S/4 HANA service
entry.content:
Will FIORI like DP90 selection screen available in S/4 PERSON_NAME service to do the billing based on contract sales order?

If not then will there be any SAP FIORI app available in S/4 PERSON_NAME service that can provide an option to input contract sales order number on selection screen to  fetch the cost of all associated service order(linked to contract sales order)?

  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EXCEPTION SEGMENT UNKNOWN RAISED error while calling RFC IDOCTYPE_READ_COMPLETE in Biztalk Middlewar
entry.content:
Hello Mates,

Good Day!

Currently we are facing issue when importing the extended idocs from SAP S4 to biztalk with IDOC segment release 701. We tried changing the WE20 outbound partner profiles parameter idoc release to 701 and also in T-code WE82 but no luck. All segments are in released stated and unlocked and also verified AUTH Issue.

I highly doubt the feasibility and compatability if SAP S4 actually accepts 701 release or not?!!!

Flow:

SAP S4 (idoc extension with 701 release)  -> MS Biztalk -> EDI Partners

Error:

Error while retrieving or generating the WSDL. Adapter message: Details: ErrorCode=RFC_EXCEPTION. ErrorGroup=RFC_ERROR_APPLICATION_EXCEPTION. SapErrorMessage=EXCEPTION SEGMENT_UNKNOWN RAISED.  AdapterErrorMessage=Error returned by RfcCallReceiveEx while calling RFC: IDOCTYPE_READ_COMPLETE..

 

Screenshot:

Thanks and Regards,

Rajesh PS

entry.title: Process consulting for scrap percentage in BOM .
entry.content: Further to our meeting , please let us know whether the process followed in sigma system is correct or not related to scrap percentage maintained in production bom as it explodes in sales process .

entry.title: Getting error while creating Asset master : Area 01 is not defined as a Revaluation Area
entry.content: Getting error while creating Asset master : Area 01 is not defined as a Revaluation Area, however system is asking us to maintain Area 01 as a revaluation area.

entry.title: Creation of New PO condition Type
entry.content: We want to create a new PO condition type that does not affect the material price and behaves separately. The amount should be posted to a separate G/L account.

entry.title: 16 schedule Line should be maintain in VOV5
entry.content:
Find attached document for your reference.
Could you please check and advise to add additional schedule line categories to fulfill this requirement.

Business needs to maintain 6 additional Schedule line categories (Total 16 Schedule line category) but here system allowing to maintain only 10.
Could you please check and suggest fulfilling this requirement.

entry.title: SAP PE51 Issues with displaying wage item amounts in Tai wan payroll slip design
entry.content:
1、I designed a Tai wan payroll slip. Taking the meal allowance（2009） as an example, the calculated result in the RT table is   1,000 TWD However, in the above translation, there is an issue with the display of the amount.

2、PE51  payroll slip

The single field design for wage item 2009 is as follows:

3、执行PC00_M42_CEDT 

The value of wage type 2009 in the payslip is 100 times smaller than the value of wage type 2009 in the RT table. Please advise，thanks.

entry.title: Searching for a CDS view with service order costs (BW extraction)
entry.content:
Dear all,

We use S/4 Service and need a CDS view to extract service order item costs to our BW/4 system. I've found I_AcctgServiceDocumentItem but there are no values in it.

Is there a CDS view which we can use as an extractor?

Thanks & best regards,
Yvonne

entry.title: MR11 change layout (grid) is not working
entry.content:
I have an issue with MR11 transaction. I try to change the layout by bringing an extra field. When i hit check the layout breaks giving me an empty layout (3 screenshots)

After that whatever field i try to bring it just doesnt work. When i mark all of them only 3 are showing 

I also searched sap notes and googled it but nothing .

entry.title: Wrong behavior of sap.ui.core.theming.Parameters for sap.gantt.simple.GanttChartContainer
entry.content:
Hi,

After upgrading our system to S4/2023 and the latest available SAPUI5 ABAP Patch 1.120.39, i get this error from rendering the GanttChart we use in one of our views: [FUTURE FATAL] One or more parameters could not be found. - sap.ui.core.theming.Parameters. I debuged this and realized, that the hex color we use for the property "fill" in the sap.gantt.simple.BaseRectangle, will pass directly to the parameter sName from sap/ui/core/theming/Parameters.js and at the moment the method with the propertyName: sName is returned, the error appeare in the console. It seems, the difference between a real parameter name and a hex color can't be distinguished and therefore, i get too many errors, that i sent above, in the console.

Could you please help me to solve this?

 

Best regards,

Setareh Ganjimanesh

entry.title: How are you approaching extensibility while trying to maintain a clean core in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Seeing this come up a lot lately with SAP S/4HANA. Everyone wants a clean core until the business asks for something that doesn’t fit standard. 

Of course extensions wil happen but how do you keep things from turning into chaos again over time? Are you going more side-by-side, in-app, or just figuring it out case by case?

entry.title: How has RISE with SAP changed ownership across teams in your organization?
entry.content:
Since moving to RISE with SAP, things kind of shifted around. Stuff like infrastructure isn't really ours anymore as SAP handles most of that. We've been in the process of figuring out what we actually own.

We’re less involved in the technical operations and more focused on integration and making processes work across the business. At the beginning it wasn’t always clear who owned what, but over time it’s become more defined.

Curious to hear how others are navigating that shift, has it made things simpler or just different?

entry.title: Logging table SAPWSD./1CADMC/00000262 in source system ECQ is very large
entry.content:
hi SAP,

Logging table SAPWSD./1CADMC/00000262 in source system ECQ is very large, " critical objects in 2 billion record limit " 

So we were checking as this is not an application table and is a SLT related Logging table So what's the best practice to reduce its growth ? is it table paritioning ? or is it reloading the table again ?

Please confirm how we proceed to fix this ?

entry.title: ECC Transaction/Fiori app to be used for Mass deletion of PR (Purchase Requisition)
entry.content:
MASS / MEMASSRQ / Fiori F2594 - Mass Changes to Purchase Requisitions are not working for mass deletion of purchase requisitions. Please provide what can be used to mass delete the PR's


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Go to MASS / MEMASSRQ / Fiori F2594, Deletion indicator not available.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MASSIVE CHANGE Output Condition records
entry.content:
It is needed to apply a massive change to the output conditon records to the send status, over 20.000 records.

The infomation is in the SOMG table.

We need a report or transaction where this can be done.

Thank you

entry.title: How to post a validity start date for a contract in the past?
entry.content: How to post a validity start date for a contract in the past?

entry.title: ORDRSP/ORDERS05 IDoc Not Validating Plant (WERKS) in E1EDP01 Segment
entry.content: We are using inbound ORDRSP / ORDERS05 (process code: ORDR) to update order confirmations for delivery schedules. However, the plant (WERKS) in segment E1EDP01 is not being validated. Even if an incorrect plant is sent, the IDoc is processed successfully.  Is there an option in standard SAP functionally to validate the plant code on the IDOC for ORDRSP / ORDERS05 ?

entry.title: Transfer an Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) from one company code to another
entry.content: Accounting may need to transfer an Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) from one company code to another.  How would they accomplish that?
